pages.title: Phase III — The Forest Beyond
pages.text: $(bold)Core mods: Twilight Forest, Mekanism, Mystical Agriculture, NuclearCraft$(br2)Enter the Twilight Forest and defeat four bosses: Naga, Lich, Hydra, Snow Queen. Their trophies are required for the Phase III seal.$(br2)$(bold)Twilight Sigil Plate$() recipe: Naga Scale + Lich Trophy + Hydra Chop + Snow Queen Trophy + RS Processor Binding.

pages.title: Phase IV — Infinite Architecture
pages.text: $(bold)Core mods: NuclearCraft, Cataclysm, Applied Energistics 2, Mekanism$(br2)Build a Fission Reactor. Fight two Cataclysm bosses for their eyes. Construct your first AE2 network.$(br2)$(bold)Reactor Authority Seal$() recipe: 2x Cataclysm Flame Eye + 2x Cataclysm Void Eye + 2x Mekanism Infused Alloy + NuclearCraft Fission Reactor Casing.

pages.title: Phase V — Architect's Ascent
pages.text: $(bold)Core mods: Draconic Evolution, Blood Magic (Master tier), AE2$(br2)The final phase. Draconium from the End. Master Blood Orb. AE2 autocrafting networks. Draconic Evolution armor.$(br2)$(bold)Heart of the Vault:$() 2x AE2 Fluix Crystal + Draconium Ingot + Master Blood Orb + Cataclysm Flame Eye + Mekanism Atomic Alloy.$(br2)$(bold)Vault Convergence$() — the true endgame item — requires 4x Awakened Draconium, Dragon Egg, 2x Master Blood Orb, Heart of the Vault, and Atomic Alloy.
